hero.subtitle: Forget clunky stat trackers. Villiant Vault is an AI ecosystem that stores your entire hand history, cross-references GTO, and outputs precision exploits for every specific opponent.
hero.quote: "Those who upgrade their mindset first take money from those still playing by feel."
hero.trust: Bleeding Edge Tech · Build Your System · Zero-Detect

features.pain_overline: Pain Point — Straight truth, hurts a bit
features.pain_h2: You are gambling without an edge.
features.pain_sub: Donating daily, bleeding chips, and tilting. Stop feeding the fish and put your money in the vault.
features.p1_fix: Vault calculates exact odds for you
features.p2_text: Studied GTO but still playing on feelings
features.p3_text: Don't know who is an ATM and who is a Shark
features.p4_text: Know they play 'wrong' but don't know how to explicitly note it
features.p4_fix: Type naturally, AI structures it into tactical intel
features.p5_text: Take notes but never know how to apply them efficiently later
features.p5_fix: Automatically weaves notes into real-time strategy
features.p6_text: Old HUDs spam raw numbers, creating cognitive overload and bad decisions
features.p6_fix: Points out WEAKNESSES & EXPLOITS instantly instead of raw math
features.ux_overline: Hand Analyzer — Review like a Pro
features.ux_h3:
Upload hand.
AI dissects every mistake.
features.f1_desc: Crop the table → paste → get Call/Fold + range + detailed plan instantly. No brain damage.
features.f2_desc: Dedicated panel: Whale, Reg, or yourself. Get specific exploit suggestions.
features.f3_desc: Fully customize your AI. Force it to answer conservatively (GTO) or aggressively (Max Exploit) using powerful overriding prompts.
features.f4_desc: Not just one boring AI. It's a team of pros with distinct personalities — no fatigue, no tilt.
features.f5_desc: The system fixes your play every day — never toxic but won't go easy on you.
features.f6_desc: GTO for the framework, exploit for the money, memory to protect the bankroll.

ux_steps.step2: AI analyzes every street — points out leaks & mistakes
ux_steps.step3: Get specific exploit strategy for next time

terminal.mistake: ⚠ TURN — BB check → fold to small bet
terminal.desc: Too passive, missed river value bet opportunity
terminal.exploit_1: BET river 75% pot | range: TT+, AQs+ | freq: 80%
terminal.exploit_2: FOLD turn vs 3x raise | range: weak pairs | freq: 100%
terminal.leak_1: Passive river play — trigger: check + fold to small bet

dashboard.sub: No more guessing about your enemies. Centralized dashboard featuring Priority Targets and Elite Regs, so you know exactly which tables to play and who is trying to take your chips.

howToUse.title: See how Vault makes you money

hud.h3:
Not on the table.
Dedicated panel, instant clarity.
hud.detail_sub: Each opponent gets an active profile — AI analyzes Exploit Strategy, Positional Leaks, Range Adjustments, and auto-notes. You just glance and decide.
hud.feat1_desc: AI automatically generates exploit strategies per street, position, and specific node. Complete with sizing, range, and frequency.
hud.feat2_desc: Detects leaks by node — passive river, loose turn call, overbet bluff... Each leak comes with a specific trigger.
hud.feat3_desc: Auto-notes generated from every analyzed hand. Includes board texture, pot type, action line, and severity.
hud.feat4_desc: Specific range adjustment suggestions for each opponent — tighten, widen, overbet, trap — nothing generic.
hud.whales_tip: Bluff turn more • Thin value bet river
hud.you_tip: System fixes you daily — no mercy 😄

what_is.sub: Not a tool. Not a solver. Not a confusing VPIP/PFR HUD. It's 2026 — it's a vault + a brain + a tilt-free AI GTO analysis team.
what_is.pillar1_desc: When you face a spot — the system auto-retrieves every similar hand you've played, every note you've written, every opponent pattern in the same position. Nothing forgotten, nothing missed.
what_is.pillar2_desc: Retrieved data is fed into AI alongside GTO fundamentals — ranges, frequencies, sizing. The system compares the opponent's actual behavior against GTO baseline to find deviations.
what_is.pillar3_desc: The AI synthesizes your memory + GTO baseline + opponent deviations to generate precise exploit strategies.
what_is.note_body: To unlock 100% of this pipeline's power, combine it with the Desktop App. The Desktop HUD automatically tracks and notes every single micro-action of your opponents. However, even if you just use the Web version for manual hand uploads and basic notes — this core ecosystem alone will keep you leagues ahead of the majority of players.

pricing_section.h2: Cheaper than one bad river call.
pricing_section.sub: Invest in an AI that pays for itself in a single session.
pricing_section.a1: No — let Vault think, you just click.
pricing_section.a2: Vault doesn't know 'lost 3 hands in a row so I am mad'.
pricing_section.a3: Know the rules? That's enough. Vault pulls you up.

contact.bigsub: But with Villiant Vault, you gamble with a PLAN.
contact.h2: You are not a gambler — you are a BUSINESSMAN.
contact.sub: Stop bleeding edge. Manage your game like a portfolio.
contact.note: No credit card required to start. Cancel anytime.

footer.tagline: The first AI vault for poker. Memory + GTO + Exploit — all in one system.

anti_detect.h2: Desktop App — Built for Safety From the Ground Up.
anti_detect.sub: RobinHUD Desktop follows a zero-intrusion principle: no injection, no hooks, no automation. Every action is triggered by you, with natural human-like timing — just like taking notes by hand.
anti_detect.web_alt: Still worried? Use the Web version — full AI analysis, hand review, and player notes all work in your browser. No install, no risk.
anti_detect.f1_desc: RobinHUD only captures the pixels displayed on your screen, then uses AI to read player names. No DLL injection, no memory hooks, no process snooping — ever.
anti_detect.f2_desc: Every scan is manually triggered by you — press a button or hit F5. No background timers, no continuous polling. Minimizes any automated software signatures.
anti_detect.f3_desc: Every action (name scanning, data fetching, HUD display) has a randomized 200–800ms delay, simulating natural human reading speed rather than instant machine processing.
anti_detect.f4_desc: The HUD uses WPF Overlay — the same standard transparent window technology used by Discord, OBS, and Zalo for floating notifications. No special techniques involved.
anti_detect.github_desc: Read every line of RobinHUD's code on GitHub. Our Desktop App is open source so anyone can verify — no keyloggers, no malware, no hidden data collection.

manifesto.h2:
We have the Brain.
But not the Eyes yet.
manifesto.subtitle: The LLM is the brain — it reasons, analyzes, plans strategy. But without data, it's a genius wearing a blindfold. RobinHUD gives it eyes.
manifesto.brain_desc: Capable of GTO reasoning, range analysis, pattern reading, exploit planning. But without input data — it's only latent power.
manifesto.eyes_desc: Every hand you analyze, every note you write, every opponent you track — that's data. The more data, the clearer AI "sees" your opponent pool.
manifesto.pipeline_sub: Not a ChatGPT wrapper. This is a real pipeline — your data gets encoded into vectors, stored permanently, and augmented into every AI reasoning cycle.
manifesto.step1_desc: Hand history, notes, player behavior — everything you feed in gets encoded into vector embeddings and stored in a Vector DB.
manifesto.step2_desc: When you query — the system finds the top-K most relevant data from Vector DB and injects it directly into the LLM prompt context.
manifesto.step3_desc: The LLM makes decisions based on YOUR private data, not generic responses. More data = more precise exploits.
manifesto.feedback_loop: Feedback Loop — more data, sharper edge, self-improving system
manifesto.realtalk_quote:
In a few years, the game will be exponentially harder.
How long can you keep playing the old way?
manifesto.history_p1: Electricity was invented — people were scared of being electrocuted. Bitcoin appeared — called a scam. AI now — same skepticism. But looking back, they were all obvious — and early adopters won.
manifesto.history_p2: Out there AI writes code, AI trades, AI automates everything. But Poker is still in the "hand fan" era — manual notes, relying on memory, staring at HUD stats and self-interpreting numbers. This is fertile ground that almost nobody is farming properly.
manifesto.debunk_title: AI is wrong? Or you don't know how to use it?
manifesto.debunk_p1: AI sometimes hallucinates, sometimes gets it wrong — true. But the problem isn't AI, it's how you use it. Using AI ≠ leveraging AI.
manifesto.debunk_p2: Smart players don't ask AI "should I fold or call" and blindly follow. They build workflows, design systems, leverage data — using AI as a lever to scale reasoning speed, analysis depth, and decision quality. That's real leverage.
manifesto.builder_desc: I understand exactly how detection systems (RTA) work. If I was scared of "use it and get banned", I wouldn't have built RobinHUD in the first place. What I need now is data, feedback, and early adopters — so the system can learn, improve, and scale.
manifesto.old_4: Game gets harder in years → no competitive edge left
manifesto.new_1: Vector DB remembers ALL your data FOREVER
manifesto.new_2: AI delivers exploit + leak → act immediately
manifesto.new_3: Data compounds → edge grows like compound interest 📈
manifesto.new_4: Game gets harder → system evolves with it
manifesto.close_1:
The question isn't "should I use AI?".
The question is: will you be the one who uses it first, or wait until everyone does?
manifesto.close_2: Electricity, internet, Bitcoin, smartphones — every revolution started with a small group willing to try before the masses caught on. Poker is no different. It's not about which tool, it's about which mindset.
manifesto.close_3: Those who shift their mindset first don't need permission. They create their own edge.

roadmap.title: Poker Hybrid System.
roadmap.subtitle: RobinHUD is not just a HUD. It's an ecosystem where decisions are driven by data, context, AI, and real-time scaling.

phase1.title: Phase 1 (Live Now): Villiant Vault + RobinHUD Desktop App V1
phase1.desc: Fast and accessible experience. A sharp tool for hand reviews and direct opponent exploitation.
phase1.pt1: Web-based app: Upload hands for quick AI review, leak extraction & Exploit tips
phase1.pt2: Desktop App V1: Smooth desktop experience, fully synced with the web platform
phase1.pt3: Building trust, community & data collection for scaling

phase2.title: Phase 2 - Core Upgrade
phase2.desc: Memory + GTO Pipeline. We stop looking at isolated hands. Current hand + Opponent History + GTO Baseline = Strategy.

phase3.title: Phase 3: Desktop App V2 (Final/Auto-Scale)
phase3.desc: The Final Version with auto-scale capabilities. More data exponentially increases your edge.
phase3.pt1: Auto-Scanner: Automatically reads the table, takes notes, and updates the system
phase3.pt2: Auto-scale: Automated scaling capabilities based on gathered player data
phase3.pt3: Optimized by actual player pools for Enterprise / Team scale

phase4.title: Phase 4 - Mobile App
phase4.desc: Take it to live tournaments. Equipped with an offline/online pocket coach trained on massive data to crush the live scene.

philosophy.title: Why Subscription?
philosophy.desc: It pays for powerful dedicated servers, prevents spam, and funds this exact roadmap. Your support builds an unfair advantage.
